entry.title: New: BFED-47 Bill 30 (2026) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 30 (2026), AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET: INCREASE ESTIMATED REVENUES, CARRYOVER/SAVINGS, GENERAL FUND; TRANSFER TO THE GENERAL EXCISE TAX FUND; DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT (CENTRAL MAUI REGIONAL WASTEWATER RECLAMATION FACILITY) (BFED-47)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
